description: When a French root-level HTML page is edited, warn if the corresponding EN counterpart under en/ has not also been queued for editing in this turn.
message: BILINGUAL CHECK: You are editing a root-level HTML page (FR). Verify that the English mirror under en/ has also been updated — or confirm the change is FR-only. Pages must be kept in sync. See copilot-instructions.md §Bilingual pages.
